post.title: Statistical-arbitrage: Mean Reversion Trading
post.subtitle: Course: Cointegration, ADF, CADF, Johansen-test, Risk management
post.description: Course: Cointegration, ADF, CADF, Johansen-test, Risk management
post.truncated_body_text: In the following educational post, I will examine mean-reversion trading. I will introduce cointegration, the Augmented Dickey–Fuller test, the Johansen test, the mathematics of half-life, and my own method for incorporating the realised distribution (skewness and kurtosis).
